steps.t: Merethrond is located near the Citadel. You should seek out the feast-hall.
Beregond can be found in Merethrond, near the Citadel. You should speak to Beregond.
Merethrond can be found near the Citadel. You should collect empty plates to bring to the kitchen staff.
The kitchen staff can be found on the lowest level of Merethrond. You should take the plates to the kitchen staff.
Beregond can be found in Merethrond, near the Citadel. You should speak to Beregond.
